query:
SELECT user_id, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0)::decimal(20, 9) as "total!"
            FROM credits_transactions
            WHERE user_id = ANY($1)
              AND source_id LIKE 'auto_topup_%'
              AND created_at >= date_trunc('month', now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
            GROUP BY user_id
